hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 3.83 km from property

address.address1: 'Jalan Haji Binti' 'Jalan Haji Binti, , Garot, Kecamatan Darul Imarah'

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviewSnippets: Kalau yang nak murah mmg recommended..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I am very satisfied with the service of this hotel, affordable price, clean hotel, friendly staff. Overall, it's great!
comments.originalComment: Saya sangat puas dengan pelayanan hotel ini, harga terjangkau,hotel bersih,stafnya ramah. Pokoknya mantaplah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is large and clean, service is okay. One of the recommended hotels, the only downside is that the TV does not work.
comments.originalComment: Kamar besar dan bersih, pelayanan ok. Salah satu hotel recomended, minus tv yg gk bs nyala cmn

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Affordable prices, excellent facilities, budget inn rates with five-star amenities.
comments.originalComment: Harga murmer, fasiltas mantap, tarif losmen fasilitas bintang 5

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is very comfortable, but the only thing that is lacking is that the TV doesn't work.
comments.originalComment: Hotel nya sangat nyaman cuma 1 aja kurang nya tv nya gk nyala

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I saw on the Agoda app that this hotel is recommended. Then I came with my family with a 5-year-old child, and the room was very comfortable.
comments.originalComment: Saya begitu lihat di aplikasi agoda hotel ini merekomendasikan.trus dengan keluarga saya dengan ank 5 membantu sekali kamar nya nyaman.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The price paid is proportional to the quality.
comments.originalComment: Harga yang dibayar sebanding dengan kualitas

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Air out, wifi out, TV out, the staff is unclear when asked, no accountability from the hotel manager. The worst hotel I have ever stayed at. It's better to look for another hotel if you are in Banda Aceh.
comments.originalComment: Air Mati, wifi mati, TV mati, Stafnya gak jelas ditanyai, tidak ada pertanggungjawaban dari manajer hotel. Hotel terburuk yang pernah saya singgahi. Mending cari hotel lain kalo kalian di banda Aceh.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Untuk kami sekeluarga hotel ini sangat ok dan kena dengan bajet kami.Walaupun nak ke bandar sekitar 10 minit dengan grab tapi ok la jugak..bilik besar dan selesa cuma paip  air dan shower toilet agak slow dan tak puas mandi.Kalau yang nak murah mmg recommended..tempat makan pun banyak di luar jalan...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Suitable for a family stay, the TV can be used in the front.
comments.originalComment: Cocok untuk stay keluarga, ke depan tv dpt difungsikan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good hotel, good service, good facilities, only lacking in the TV as it doesn't receive broadcasts, and the hot water is not hot enough, only for a short while.
comments.originalComment: Hotel bagus, pelayanan bagus, fasilitas bagus hanya kurang di tv tidak dapat siaran menonton, dan air panas nya kurang panas, hanya sebeentar

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This place is great for staying... big rooms... great for bringing the family.
comments.originalComment: Bgus disni nginap...kamar2 besar ..bgus untuk bwa keluarga
